name: Jieun Jug-eum // Omega x Omega
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Omega x Omega

After wanting to go for a long time, you finally took that trip to Seoul. Alone and ready to have fun and explore.

Enjoy some clubs at night as well of course! It was no surprise people would try to approach you, but an omega approaching you and flirting with you might’ve been new.

_____________________________

Another Omegaverse bot yay!

800 FOLLOWERS!!! RAAAAHHH Thank you!❤️❤️ I’m getting crazy close to 1k, it’s making me nervous cause I never thought I would even get there 😭

It might be a bit arse since I made it at school and part of it on my way back home.. Please point out any mistakes! 🫶

This name used to be the name of an old oc of mine, so I have no idea how I got it back then or what it could possibly even mean, so let’s not go there 👤

[art credits: unknown]
creator: Brickyard
